idea-plugin.name: Config Assistant
idea-plugin.description:
Config Assistant

A lightweight YAML, JSON, and properties workspace inside IntelliJ IDEA for temporary config inspection, formatting, and comparison.

It is especially useful when comparing configuration differences across environments, reviewing service migration changes, or troubleshooting deployment issues without creating throwaway config files in your project.

Key Features

  • Project-level multi-view YAML, JSON, and properties workspace
  • Native IntelliJ Diff between saved views
  • In-place YAML, JSON, and properties formatting
  • Inline YAML, JSON, and properties validation feedback
  • Saved views persist after IDE restart
  • No need to create temporary local config files

Common Use Cases

  • Compare YAML, JSON, or properties configs across environments during troubleshooting
  • Review configuration changes during service migration
  • Keep before/after snapshots while adjusting config
  • Inspect copied config quickly without polluting the project

Getting Started

  1. Open Config Assistant from the right tool window bar.
  2. Click + to create saved views for different config variants.
  3. Paste YAML, JSON, or properties text into each view. Views are stored at the project level.
  4. Use Format to normalize config content and keep it readable.
  5. Use Compare to select two saved views and open the native IntelliJ Diff window.
  6. Close extra views with the tab x. The first View is always kept.
  7. Invalid YAML, JSON, or properties content is highlighted inline, and the status bar shows whether parsing succeeded.

中文简介

Config Assistant 是一个直接工作在 IntelliJ IDEA 里的轻量级 YAML、JSON 与 properties 配置工作区，适合临时查看、整理和对比配置内容。

当你需要排查不同环境之间的配置差异、核对服务迁移前后的 YAML / JSON / properties，或者临时查看别人发来的配置时，不需要再在本地项目里新建一次性配置文件，用完再删除。

适合排查环境差异、核对迁移配置、保留 before / after 快照，以及快速查看复制过来的配置，又不污染项目目录。

更多中文说明可见 README.zh-CN。

action.description: View current YAML file as a tree structure
Format and beautify current YAML file
Open the Config Assistant workspace and compare saved YAML views
Convert between YAML and JSON formats
